source.title: Anticipation of increasing monetary reward selectively recruits nucleus accumbens.

confidence_rationale: Foundational MID paper; cleanest single piece of evidence that anticipatory positive arousal in NAcc is a measurable, dissociable construct that correlates with self-reported HAPPINESS at reward cues, not with directional wanting amplitude. n=8 small but the result has been replicated thousands of times since. Source quality high (J Neurosci, foundational citation), mapping fidelity moderate-high (the construct measured -- 'happiness elicited by reward cues' -- is exactly REE's candidate VALENCE_EXCITEMENT), transfer risk low (the construct is human-defined-and-measured).
failure_signatures: Anticipation of increasing punishment did NOT activate NAcc; punishment-anticipation activated medial caudate instead. Excitement-as-NAcc-signature is positive-valence-specific, not arousal-general.

mapping.source_claim_statement: NAcc activation during anticipation of monetary reward correlates with self-reported happiness at reward cues; punishment-anticipation activates a distinct region (medial caudate). NAcc codes expected POSITIVE incentive value, not general anticipatory salience.
mapping.ree_translation: VALENCE_EXCITEMENT (candidate 5th channel in SD-014's residue valence vector) maps onto the NAcc-anticipation signature: high-arousal positive affect at the cue, distinct from VALENCE_WANTING (directional motivation toward goal) and VALENCE_LIKING (consummatory hedonic). The neural correlate is positive-valence-selective, not arousal-general -- excitement is not z_beta_arousal multiplied by sign.
mapping.mapping_caveat: The MID paradigm uses monetary reward in healthy adults; mapping to REE's CausalGridWorldV2 + drive-modulated reward is an inference about the same underlying construct. Self-reported happiness is the construct anchor, not pure neural correlation. n=8 in the original paper, though replicated extensively.
mapping.source_context: Healthy adult humans, fMRI during monetary incentive delay task, reward and punishment anticipation contrasted parametrically.

confidence_components.notes: Foundational paper, peer-reviewed, replicated thousands of times. Mapping fidelity slightly reduced by gridworld-vs-monetary-reward gap, but the construct is human-defined and the REE candidate channel is faithful to the construct.
